question: How do I create an invoice?

step.thought: The user wants to create an invoice. We are on the Acme Invoices dashboard; the first step is to open the Invoices section from the sidebar navigation.

tool_call.element: The 'Invoices' link in the left sidebar navigation, below 'Customers'
tool_call.instruction: Click Invoices in the left sidebar.

step.note: The Invoices page lists existing invoices; the primary 'New Invoice' button is in the top-right of the page header.
step.thought: We are on the Invoices list now. To create a new invoice the user must open the creation form via the New Invoice button.

tool_call.element: The 'New Invoice' primary button in the top-right corner of the page header
tool_call.instruction: Click the New Invoice button in the top right.

step.note: The new invoice form is open: customer select, due date, a line items table, and notes.
step.thought: The creation form is open. I will demonstrate filling a line item by typing a work description into the first row.

tool_call.element: The first line item 'Description' text input with placeholder 'What was the work?'
tool_call.instruction: I'll fill in the first line item for you.

step.note: The line item description is filled in.
step.thought: Last thing the user needs to know is where to submit the form.

tool_call.element: The 'Create invoice' primary submit button at the bottom left of the form
tool_call.instruction: When you're done, click Create invoice down here to save it.

step.thought: All parts of the flow are shown: navigate to Invoices, open the form, fill line items, submit. The question is fully addressed.

tool_call.content: That's it! Open Invoices in the sidebar, hit New Invoice, fill in your line items, and press Create invoice when you're ready. I'll be down here if you need me again.
